mapper.insert: insert into friend_category (user_id, name, sort, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{name}, #{sort}, now(), now())
insert ignore into friend_category (user_id, name, sort, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{name}, #{sort}, now(), now())
mapper.select: select id, user_id as userId, name, sort, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from friend_category where user_id = #{userId} order by sort asc, id asc limit 1
select id, user_id as userId, name, sort, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from friend_category where user_id = #{userId} order by sort asc, id asc
